src/App.test.tsx::App > renders the logi.description: Login renders the branded sign-in flow and transitions into the authenticated workspace shell.

src/App.test.tsx::App > creates a new ch.description: Submitting a task creates a new chat and renders the final-output-first response card layout.

src/App.test.tsx::App > creates a chat f.description: Submitting the first task from workspace home creates a new chat and activates the thread route using the created thread payload.

src/App.test.tsx::App > renders streamed.description: The workspace shows streamed trace steps live before the final persisted turn replaces the pending card.

src/App.test.tsx::App > falls back to sy.description: The frontend falls back to the synchronous task endpoint when streaming cannot be established.

src/App.test.tsx::App > collapses and ex.description: The left rail toggle collapses and re-expands the thread history panel without breaking workspace access.

src/App.test.tsx::App > shows inline com.description: Composer validation appears inline when a request exceeds the two-subtask limit.

src/App.test.tsx::App > allows quoted an.description: Composer validation ignores and inside quoted text so a single text-transform request can still be submitted.

src/App.test.tsx::App > still flags a re.description: Composer validation still rejects a real three-subtask request even when one segment contains quoted text with and.

src/App.test.tsx::App > loads direct thr.description: Direct thread URLs resolve to a saved chat or redirect back to the home workspace when the thread is missing.

src/App.test.tsx::App > blocks creating.description: The sidebar disables new chat creation when the user has already reached the five-thread limit.

src/App.test.tsx::App > blocks submissio.description: The composer is disabled when the selected chat already contains three saved task flows.

src/App.test.tsx::App > auto-scrolls the.description: The active chat auto-scrolls to the newest pending and completed content when a later response is appended in-session.

src/App.test.tsx::App > navigates to the.description: Admins can open the admin page, create users, reveal passwords only for users created in the current session, and delete those users.

src/App.test.tsx::App > keeps admin navi.description: Standard users do not see admin navigation controls in the workspace.
